description: A trend-following strategy that enters long when the Vortex VI+ crosses above VI- and the Elder Force Index confirms bullish momentum. Enters short when VI- crosses above VI+ with bearish Force Index confirmation. Exits using a trailing stop-loss based on ATR.

exit_long.stop_loss: Trailing stop: exit when price falls 2x ATR(14) below the highest close in the last 14 bars

exit_short.stop_loss: Trailing stop: exit when price rises 2x ATR(14) above the lowest close in the last 14 bars

notes: VI_plus_prev and VI_minus_prev refer to the previous bar's VI+ and VI- values. highest_close_14_bars and lowest_close_14_bars are rolling maximum/minimum of close over 14 bars. Ensure EFI uses volume data from OHLCV.
